step_rationale: GPVI intracellular signaling kinases; proximal to platelet activation and thrombus formation.
mechanism: Src family kinases transduce GPVI collagen-binding signals, driving platelet activation and thrombus propagation at the ruptured plaque.

references.title: Gintonin modulates platelet function and inhibits thrombus formation via impaired glycoprotein VI signaling.
